name: Prune Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend the butter with the sugar until smooth.
2. Add the beaten eggs and chopped prunes to the mixture. Mix well.
3. Alternately stir in the sour milk and sifted dry ingredients, beginning and ending with the dry ingredients.
4. Pour the batter into a greased layer cake pan.
5. Bake at 375°F for 25-30 minutes.
6. Ice the cooled cake with creamy icing.
